Source.Name: dankmaterialshell
Source.Summary: Desktop shell for Wayland compositors built with Quickshell and Go
Source.Description: DankMaterialShell is a complete desktop shell for niri, Hyprland, MangoWC, Sway, labwc, Scroll, Miracle WM, and other Wayland compositors. It replaces waybar, swaylock, swayidle, mako, fuzzel, polkit, and everything else you'd normally stitch together to make a desktop.

Package.Name: dankmaterialshell
Package.Summary: Desktop shell for Wayland compositors built with Quickshell and Go
Package.Description: DankMaterialShell is a complete desktop shell for niri, Hyprland, MangoWC, Sway, labwc, Scroll, Miracle WM, and other Wayland compositors. It replaces waybar, swaylock, swayidle, mako, fuzzel, polkit, and everything else you'd normally stitch together to make a desktop.
